---
title: "Argo NetCDF File Format Checker v3.0.2 Released"
date: "2026-04-23"
categories: [gdac]
image: "/assets/images/ArgoNetCDFFormat.png"
---

A corrective release (v3.0.2) of the File Checker has been published. It addresses 3 issues that caused some compliant files to be incorrectly rejected. The 3 issues are listed on the release page:

- [https://github.com/OneArgo/ArgoFormatChecker/releases/tag/v3.0.2](https://github.com/OneArgo/ArgoFormatChecker/releases/tag/v3.0.2){target="_blank"}



**date: "2026-04-21"**

A new version (v3.0.0) of the File Checker has been released:

- [https://github.com/OneArgo/ArgoFormatChecker/releases/tag/v3.0.0](https://github.com/OneArgo/ArgoFormatChecker/releases/tag/v3.0.0){target="_blank"}

This major v3.0.0 update is essential for maintaining data compliance with the newest international network standards.

You will need to update **both** the .jar executable and the file_checker_spec folder.
This new major version mainly includes the use of NVS reference tables (updated 21/04/2026) to perform format and metadata checks. These tables are included in the file_checker_spec folder.

Other notable changes: activation of logs (console and file), PI_NAME check against the R40 table, and a fix for NaN/Inf checks in Trajectory files.
